query: Please retrieve the content of the web page from the URL 'https://www.example.com' in HTML format. Additionally, please scrape data from the website 'https://www.example2.com'. After that, retrieve information about architectural psychology and finally, retrieve details about the typography style 'Arial' used in English language.
plan: Use a web browser (Chrome, Firefox, Safari) to access the URL 'https://www.example.com'.
Save the webpage content as HTML.
Extract the HTML content using a text editor or HTML viewer.
Open a new tab in the same browser.
Scrape the required data using a web scraping tool like Beautiful Soup, Scrapy, or Selenium.
Conduct research on architectural psychology using a search engine like Google Scholar or JSTOR.
Find details about the typography style 'Arial' used in English language by searching on a design resource platform such as Typography.com or AIGA.org.
